# Farm Intellect

> AI-powered smart agriculture platform for Indian farmers, available in 22 Indian languages. Provides crop advisory, weather forecasts, pest and disease detection, mandi prices, expert consultations, and government scheme matching.

Farm Intellect connects farmers, agri-merchants, and agricultural experts through dedicated hubs. It runs offline-first (PWA), supports Aadhaar and OTP authentication, and surfaces data sourced from Indian government APIs and AI models (Google Gemini Vision, Sarvam AI).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Farm Intellect's AI-powered agriculture platform for Indian farmers.
- [Login](/login): Sign in with Aadhaar, passkey, phone OTP, or email.
- [SMS Register](/sms-register): Register a farmer account using only SMS — no smartphone required.
- [Reset Password](/reset-password): Reset the password for a Farm Intellect account.
- [Install App](/app): Install Farm Intellect as a native-feeling mobile PWA.

## Optional

- [Open App Shortcut](/launch): Direct shortcut to launch the installed Farm Intellect PWA.
